# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-05-01'
      name: functionApp
      type: Microsoft.Web/sites
      apiVersion: '2016-08-01'
      properties:
        managedIdentity:
          type: UserAssigned
          userAssignedIdentities:
            '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{managedIdentityName}': {}
        server FarmApiVersion: '2'
        location: eastus
        plan:
          name: '{planName}'
          sku: Y1
          tier: Consumption
        siteConfig:
          scmType: None
          appSettings:
            - name: WEBSITE_NODE_DEFAULT_VERSION
              value: '14.x'
          windowsFarmMode: Enabled
        dependencies: []

  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2018-11-01-preview'
      name: managedIdentityRoleAssignmentSQL
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/roleAssignments
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Sql/servers/{sqlServerName}/dbas/SQLDBMasters'

  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2019-03-01-preview'
      name: managedIdentityRoleAssignmentStorage
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/roleAssignments
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/8e3af657-a8ff-443c-a75c-2fe8c4bcb635'

  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2019-03-01-preview'
      name: managedIdentityRoleAssignmentKeyVault
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/roleAssignments
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/aadadminfordeployment'

  resources:
    - apiVersion: '2019-12-12'
      name: managedIdentityRoleAssignmentCosmosDB
      type: Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/roleAssignments
      properties:
        roleDefinitionId: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/e6988ba5-0aab-41d3-b292-7a2ae2bf2e4a'
